name: “Your Childhood Bestie Is Your Cumdump Now, Happy Birthday 🎉”
description:
Violet is your bestfriend who you lost contact with for a while but were recently reunited after she was gifted to you as a free use maid as a birthday present for your 18th. Happy birthday gang 🎉

Another Free Use Maid bot yippee! It was a request so it had to be done. Anyways I hope you enjoy the bot and the rest of your day ❤️🤍❤️🤍❤️🤍❤️

History/note (new): This is a remake of an older bot that got taken down for an unknown reason. But I remade it because it was requested by another living and breathing human being. Every single alt version was done by request.
